title: RUSTPY-0010 — binascii.b2a_qp panics with an index underflow on input starting with `\n` (`binascii.rs:507`)
notes: usize underflow: b2a_qp's newline-scan loop leaves in_idx==0 when the first byte is '\n', then `buf[in_idx - 1]` = buf[usize::MAX] (OOB). Guard needs in_idx > 0. CPython returns b'\n'. Deterministic 5/5. Also reachable via quopri.encodestring / encodings.quopri_codec.
